description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to all branches except those starting with 'release-' and on pull requests to all branches. Use a matrix build job that runs on both Windows and Linux, with different compilers (GCC, Clang, MSVC) and build types (Release). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, configure CMake, build the project, run tests, and create a zip archive of the build output. Additionally, on the master and experimental branches, upload the build artifacts to GitHub Releases.
